subcodes.first_line: The Day of Manifestation hath dawned, and the Ancient Beauty, from the Dawning-Place of the Most Great Name, calleth unto the peoples of the world and unto the Source [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم ظهور است و جمال قدم از مطلع اسم اعظم اهل عالم را ندا میفرماید و بمبدء
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
